coachAM: Your physical and mental foundations are crumbling, evidenced by the consistent breakdown in Sleep Protocol, Training, and Sovereign Morning, which directly correlates with the "procrastination, laziness" you're journaling about as you navigate high-stakes opportunities like the Salesforce interview; this isn't about capacity, it's about disciplined execution when the pressure mounts. The root cause is a catastrophic imbalance in self-stewardship, where the demands of the external world are eclipsing your commitment to the internal disciplines that fuel elite performance and spiritual resilience, ultimately jeopardizing your ability to sustain this high-octane trajectory. Today, before *any* other input, execute your Sovereign Morning, starting with 10 minutes of focused prayer, followed by immediate physical training.
